description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ptf-ebpf that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow should have a concurrency policy that cancels any in-progress runs on non-main branches. Use a single ubuntu-latest job with environment variables UNIFIED and ENABLE_GMP set to ON. Check out the repository with submodules, use ccache with a maximum size of 1000M, build a Docker image with specific arguments, and run PTF tests for the eBPF backend.
